query:
UPDATE activity_event_subscriptions
            SET expired_at = $1
            WHERE id IN (
                SELECT id FROM activity_event_subscriptions
                WHERE timeout_at <= $1
                  AND signal_data IS NULL
                  AND expired_at IS NULL
                ORDER BY timeout_at
                LIMIT $2
            )
            RETURNING id, workflow_id, activity_key, event_name, on_timeout
